test_cases.name: create_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new author can be created with valid name, bio, and born_year.

test_cases.name: create_author_with_missing_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author with missing required field 'name' returns validation error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing author can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_non_existent_author_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a non-existent author returns 404.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verifies that conditional GET with matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with mismatched ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author without associated books can be deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author with associated books returns 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_category_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new category can be created with valid name and description.

test_cases.name: create_category_with_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a category with a duplicate name returns 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new book can be created with valid data including author and category.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with an ISBN of invalid length returns validation error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing book can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_by_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: update_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: update_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_already_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an already soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a soft-deleted book can be restored.

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a non-deleted book returns 400 Bad Request.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_eligible_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a book published less than 1 year ago returns 400.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeding_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verifies that exceeding the rate limit for discount endpoint returns 429.

test_cases.name: update_book_stock_with_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that book stock can be updated with a valid quantity.

test_cases.name: update_book_stock_resulting_in_negative
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating stock resulting in negative value returns 400 Bad Request.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that a valid cover image can be uploaded for a book.

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_cover_type
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading an unsupported file type returns 415 Unsupported Media Type.

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading a file larger than 2MB returns 413 Content Too Large.
